# Halo Protocol

> Decentralized lending circles (ROSCA) on the Stacks blockchain. Build credit through community.

## What is Halo Protocol?

Halo Protocol is a decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol on the Stacks blockchain that enables community-based lending circles (also known as ROSCA — Rotating Savings and Credit Associations). Members contribute to a shared pool each round, and one member receives the pot through a competitive bidding mechanism. All contributions and credit scores are recorded on-chain for transparency and verifiability.

## Key Features

- **Lending Circles**: Create or join lending circles with customizable contribution amounts, round durations, and member counts
- **Multi-Asset Vault**: Deposit USDCx, sBTC, STX, or hUSD into the vault to earn yield and use as collateral for circle participation
- **On-Chain Credit Scoring**: Build a verifiable credit score through on-time payments, tracked immutably on the Stacks blockchain
- **Competitive Bidding**: Members bid for the pool each round — lowest bid wins, creating a natural interest rate market
- **Collateral-Backed**: Vault deposits serve as collateral, with configurable LTV ratios per asset type

## How It Works

1. **Sign Up**: Authenticate with Google or GitHub, then bind a Stacks wallet (Leather or Xverse)
2. **Deposit**: Add assets (USDCx, sBTC, STX, hUSD) to the multi-asset vault
3. **Join a Circle**: Find or create a lending circle with your desired parameters
4. **Contribute**: Make regular contributions each round to the shared pool
5. **Bid & Win**: Place bids to receive the pool — lowest bid wins
6. **Build Credit**: On-time payments increase your on-chain credit score

## Technical Details

- **Blockchain**: Stacks (Bitcoin L2)
- **Smart Contracts**: 11 Clarity contracts deployed on mainnet
- **Token Support**: USDCx, sBTC, STX, hUSD
- **Yield Strategy**: Synthetix-style reward accumulator (reward-per-token-stored pattern)
- **Credit Scores**: Range from 300-850, updated per payment event

## Links

- Website: https://haloprotocol.xyz
- Status: https://haloprotocol.xyz/status
- Explore Circles: https://haloprotocol.xyz/explore
- Documentation: https://haloprotocol.xyz/docs
- Whitepaper: https://haloprotocol.xyz/whitepaper

## API

- Health Check: GET /api/health
- Explore Circles: GET /api/circles-v2/explore
